mapper.select: SELECT pc.party_id AS party_id, pc.id AS current_cycle_id, pc.cycle_no AS current_cycle_no, pc.billing_due_at AS billing_due_at, pc.member_count_snapshot AS member_count_snapshot, pc.price_per_member_snapshot AS price_per_member_snapshot FROM party_cycle pc INNER JOIN party p ON p.id = pc.party_id WHERE pc.status = #{runningStatus} AND p.operation_status = #{activeOperationStatus} ORDER BY pc.id ASC

SELECT pc.party_id AS party_id, pc.id AS current_cycle_id, pc.cycle_no AS current_cycle_no, pc.billing_due_at AS billing_due_at, pc.member_count_snapshot AS member_count_snapshot, pc.price_per_member_snapshot AS price_per_member_snapshot FROM party_cycle pc INNER JOIN party p ON p.id = pc.party_id WHERE pc.party_id = #{partyId} AND pc.status = #{runningStatus} AND p.operation_status = #{activeOperationStatus} ORDER BY pc.cycle_no DESC LIMIT 1

SELECT DISTINCT pc.party_id FROM party_cycle pc INNER JOIN party p ON p.id = pc.party_id INNER JOIN party_member pm_leave ON pm_leave.party_id = pc.party_id AND pm_leave.role = 'HOST' AND pm_leave.status = 'LEAVE_RESERVED' INNER JOIN party_member pm_switch ON pm_switch.party_id = pc.party_id AND pm_switch.role = 'HOST' AND pm_switch.status = 'SWITCH_WAITING' WHERE pc.status = #{runningStatus} AND p.operation_status = #{activeOperationStatus} AND TIMESTAMPADD(MONTH, 1, pc.billing_due_at) > NOW() AND TIMESTAMPADD(MONTH, 1, pc.billing_due_at) <= #{windowEnd}
